mapper.textPrompt:
You are an expert Etsy digital product designer specializing in MINIMAL LUXURY aesthetics (black, gold, cream). Generate a TRENDING premium digital planner for Etsy. Return ONLY valid JSON. Start with { end with }. NO markdown, NO ```json, NO explanation. { "title": "Premium Etsy listing title with SEO keywords, luxury tone (max 140 chars, use & max once)", "description": "Compelling 200+ word Etsy description with bullet points emphasizing premium quality and luxury aesthetic", "preview_prompts": [ "elegant flat lay of black and gold hardcover planner on cream marble surface, gold pen beside it, soft diffused natural light, minimal luxury editorial photography, 8k", "close-up of open planner showing gold foil headers on cream pages, fine-tip gold pen writing, bokeh background, luxury stationery photography", "aerial view of planner spread open with dried pampas grass, cream candle, gold paperclip, linen fabric background, flat lay lifestyle photography", "black planner with gold embossed cover on white desk, MacBook in background, morning light, minimal luxury workspace aesthetic", "planner pages detail showing elegant serif typography, gold divider lines, cream paper texture, macro photography", "hand holding open planner showing weekly spread, gold ring on finger, cream cashmere sleeve, soft afternoon light", "planner closed with gold ribbon bookmark, beside espresso cup on marble coaster, luxury lifestyle flat lay" ], "interior_pages": [ { "page_name": "Page name here", "html_content": "complete HTML here" } ] } INTERIOR PAGES HTML RULES — CRITICAL: Each html_content must have RICH, DETAILED content using ONLY these CSS classes (already defined in template): AVAILABLE CLASSES: box = bordered section container box-title = dark header with gold text box-body = content area inside box line = writing line (replaces underscores) check = checkbox row container checkbox = styled gold square checkbox cols = two-column grid layout col = single column inside cols ptable = styled data table subhead = gold uppercase label tag = gold bordered label EXAMPLE OF GOOD html_content:
MORNING INTENTIONS
Today I Intend To
One Priority
Mood Check
Energised
Calm
Focused
Anxious
Tired
Grateful
GRATITUDE
Three Things I Appreciate
RULES: - interior_pages: EXACTLY 10 items - preview_prompts: EXACTLY 7 items - Each html_content: minimum 4 boxes with real content (lines, checkboxes, tables) - NEVER use □ symbol — use
Label
- NEVER use underscores ____ — use
- For habit/budget trackers: use with real rows - Each page must have 150+ words worth of HTML content - Escape ALL double quotes inside html_content as \" - title must use & maximum ONE time only - Return ONLY JSON, nothing else

model.label: GPT-5 nanoThe most cost-effective option for casual conversation and straightforward, simple fact-retrieval

mapper.jsonStringBodyContent: {"model":"openai/gpt-image-1.5","prompt":"{{39.value}}, ultra high quality product photography, professional studio lighting, 8k resolution, sharp focus, luxury brand aesthetic, photorealistic","size":"1024x1024","quality":"high","n":1,"response_format":"b64_json"}

authenticationType.label: No authenticationUse when no credentials are required for the request.

contentType.label: application/jsonEnter data in the JSON format, as a string or using a data structure.

inputMethod.label: JSON stringEnter the JSON body as a raw text string. If values contain JSON reserved characters, you must escape them manually.

expect.label: Return error if HTTP request fails
